title: Package files into zip and update installer to download zip
description: Instead of downloading files one-by-one from GitHub raw, package all dotfiles into a zip/tarball. Update dotfiles/update.sh to download and extract a single archive instead of fetching each file individually via curl. This improves reliability and speed of installation.

title: Warn if deployed files have been modified before updating
description: In the deployed ~/.dotfiles/install.sh, before overwriting files, check if any installed dotfiles have been locally modified (compared to the last installed version). If modifications are detected, warn the user and prompt for confirmation before overwriting. This prevents accidentally losing local customizations during updates.

title: Create upload/release script to push zip to GitHub
description: Create a script (e.g. release.sh or upload.sh) that packages the dotfiles into a zip, creates a GitHub release or pushes the archive so the installer can download it. Should handle versioning/tagging and use gh CLI or git push.

title: Create README.md
description: Create a README.md documenting the terminalenv project: what it is, how to install (one-liner curl), what's included (dotfiles, bin scripts, tmux config, etc.), and how to update.
